brief: White House teleprompter operator put on leave for betting on Trump speeches; Merck's new cholesterol drug approved; atmosphere discovered on nearby Earthlike planet. Studies on academic networking and L2 writing patterns.
news_summary: Teleprompter operator placed on leave after reportedly betting on Trump's speeches; Trump to deliver election integrity address; astronomers find atmosphere on potentially habitable exoplanet.
papers_summary: Two studies examine academic networking for precarious scholars and positioning patterns in L2 source-based writing.

en.brief: White House teleprompter operator put on leave for betting on Trump speeches; Merck's new cholesterol drug approved; atmosphere discovered on nearby Earthlike planet. Studies on academic networking and L2 writing patterns.
en.news_summary: Teleprompter operator placed on leave after reportedly betting on Trump's speeches; Trump to deliver election integrity address; astronomers find atmosphere on potentially habitable exoplanet.
en.papers_summary: Two studies examine academic networking for precarious scholars and positioning patterns in L2 source-based writing.

zh.brief: 白宫读稿机操作员涉嫌利用特朗普演讲内幕信息在Kalshi平台下注获利近10万美元，被停职调查；皮尤调查显示全球对华好感度20多年来首次超过美国；泰国曼谷酒吧大火致32死，暴露监管漏洞。
zh.news_summary: 白宫职员涉内幕交易获利10万美元；皮尤报告显示全球对华好感超越美国；曼谷大火32人死亡，专家指法规不健全；蒋方舟论文造假引发学术监督讨论；阿根廷因福克兰横幅面临FIFA处罚。
zh.papers_summary: 两篇英文研究分别探讨了学术流动中的网络构建与不稳定状态，以及二语学生在论证写作中的立场模式对体裁表现的影响。
